_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned: update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:wake-economy
lanes.note: Standing #1 token-opt lane (MVP done/live). Zero ready beads right now = parked-as-fact, NOT gated; resume the instant ready file-disjoint work appears. This is the lane the 2026-06-25 ~2h stall mis-classified as operator-gated.

lanes.label: codename:remote-hardening
lanes.note: Gurney's live remote-worker reliability lane (durable gate-base + remote bug fixes). The 4->8 concurrency bump is gated on remote-proven, but the hardening WORK itself is ungated.

lanes.label: codename:codex
lanes.note: Leto codex-tier concurrency pilot (queue leto-codex). Fills idle local slots with file-disjoint clean P2/P3 work; offloads model cost to ChatGPT billing.

lanes.label: codename:scavenger
lanes.note: Operator experiment (admiral 2026-06-25 19:39Z 'see if it works'): crew thufir on queue thufir-q, 1-item SERIAL, codex-first + mandatory DOT review = the vetting. Continuously drains the starved low-pri/orphan backlog one heavily-vetted bead at a time. File-disjoint from gurney (internal/daemon|workers|scenariogate) + leto's active set.

lanes.label: codename:pi-openrouter

gate.reason: not before remote-worker proven reliable (priority sequence 2026-06-25)

lanes.note: Pi universal-model-gateway design. Epic-less (lives only as a plan dir) => GATED-by-definition until decomposed into an epic; gate is required while epic_id is null. Correctly the operator's to rank (genuinely brand-new initiative).
